speaker: intro
text: Patient 1. John White. Broken arm after an accident three hours ago.
ttsText: Patient 1. John White. Broken arm after an accident three hours ago.

speaker: nurse
text: Good morning. My name is _____. I am a practical nurse.
ttsText: Good morning. My name is blank. I am a practical nurse.

speaker: patient
text: Good morning.
ttsText: Good morning.

speaker: nurse
text: May I ask your name, please?
ttsText: May I ask your name, please?

speaker: patient
text: My name is John White.
ttsText: My name is John White.

speaker: nurse
text: What symptoms do you have?
ttsText: What symptoms do you have?

speaker: patient
text: I have a broken arm.
ttsText: I have a broken arm.

speaker: nurse
text: When did it happen?
ttsText: When did it happen?

speaker: patient
text: It happened three hours ago.
ttsText: It happened three hours ago.

speaker: nurse
text: Do you have any allergies?
ttsText: Do you have any allergies?

speaker: patient
text: Yes, I am allergic to paracetamol.
ttsText: Yes, I am allergic to paracetamol.

speaker: nurse
text: May I check your vital signs now?
ttsText: May I check your vital signs now?

speaker: patient
text: Yes, please.
ttsText: Yes, please.

speaker: nurse
text: Your Blood pressure is 126/82 millimeters of mercury.
ttsText: Your blood pressure is one hundred twenty-six over eighty-two millimeters of mercury.

speaker: nurse
text: Your Respiratory rate is 18 breaths per minute.
ttsText: Your respiratory rate is eighteen breaths per minute.

speaker: nurse
text: Your Pulse rate is 86 beats per minute.
ttsText: Your pulse rate is eighty-six beats per minute.

speaker: nurse
text: The X-ray room is on the second floor. Please wait for the doctor.
ttsText: The X-ray room is on the second floor. Please wait for the doctor.

speaker: patient
text: Thank you.
ttsText: Thank you.

speaker: nurse
text: You are welcome. Have a good day.
ttsText: You are welcome. Have a good day.

speaker: intro
text: Patient 2. Thomas Blake. Chest pain for two days. History of heart disease.
ttsText: Patient 2. Thomas Blake. Chest pain for two days. History of heart disease.

speaker: nurse
text: Good morning. My name is _____. I am a practical nurse.
ttsText: Good morning. My name is blank. I am a practical nurse.

speaker: patient
text: Good morning.
ttsText: Good morning.

speaker: nurse
text: May I ask your name, please?
ttsText: May I ask your name, please?

speaker: patient
text: My name is Thomas Blake.
ttsText: My name is Thomas Blake.

speaker: nurse
text: What symptoms do you have?
ttsText: What symptoms do you have?

speaker: patient
text: I have chest pain.
ttsText: I have chest pain.

speaker: nurse
text: When did the symptoms start?
ttsText: When did the symptoms start?

speaker: patient
text: They started two days ago.
ttsText: They started two days ago.

speaker: nurse
text: Do you have any underlying diseases?
ttsText: Do you have any underlying diseases?

speaker: patient
text: Yes, I have heart disease.
ttsText: Yes, I have heart disease.

speaker: nurse
text: This is important. I will call the doctor and check your vital signs now.
ttsText: This is important. I will call the doctor and check your vital signs now.

speaker: nurse
text: Your Blood pressure is 146/92 millimeters of mercury.
ttsText: Your blood pressure is one hundred forty-six over ninety-two millimeters of mercury.

speaker: nurse
text: Your Pulse rate is 104 beats per minute.
ttsText: Your pulse rate is one hundred four beats per minute.

speaker: nurse
text: The cardiology clinic is on the second floor. Please stay seated and try to stay calm.
ttsText: The cardiology clinic is on the second floor. Please stay seated and try to stay calm.

speaker: patient
text: Thank you.
ttsText: Thank you.

speaker: intro
text: Patient 3. Peter Brown. Diarrhea for three days. No allergies and no underlying disease.
ttsText: Patient 3. Peter Brown. Diarrhea for three days. No allergies and no underlying disease.

speaker: nurse
text: Good morning. My name is _____. I am a practical nurse.
ttsText: Good morning. My name is blank. I am a practical nurse.

speaker: patient
text: Good morning.
ttsText: Good morning.

speaker: nurse
text: What symptoms do you have?
ttsText: What symptoms do you have?

speaker: patient
text: I have diarrhea.
ttsText: I have diarrhea.

speaker: nurse
text: How long have you had diarrhea?
ttsText: How long have you had diarrhea?

speaker: patient
text: For three days.
ttsText: For three days.

speaker: nurse
text: Do you have vomiting or abdominal pain?
ttsText: Do you have vomiting or abdominal pain?

speaker: patient
text: Yes, I have abdominal pain, but no vomiting.
ttsText: Yes, I have abdominal pain, but no vomiting.

speaker: nurse
text: We need a stool test and a urine test to check the cause.
ttsText: We need a stool test and a urine test to check the cause.

speaker: nurse
text: Please drink small sips of water and wait for the doctor.
ttsText: Please drink small sips of water and wait for the doctor.

speaker: patient
text: Thank you.
ttsText: Thank you.
